Description:
Lots of updates this week!

🔎 Looking for content on a particular topic? Search the channel. If I have something it will be there! 🤔 Due to the channel growth and number of people wanting help I no longer can answer or even read questions and they will just stay in the moderation queue never to be seen so please post questions to other sites like Reddit, Microsoft Community Hub etc.

▬▬▬▬▬▬ C H A P T E R S ⏰ ▬▬▬▬▬▬ 00:00 - Introduction 00:29 - New videos 01:13 - AMA next week 01:29 - AKS Flatcar Container Linux retire 02:03 - Azure Batch VM SKU and image retirements 03:11 - AVS AC30P and AV52 node retirements 03:29 - HC, HBv2 and NP VM SKU retirement 03:41 - Azure RedHat OpenShift MI support 04:07 - WAF DRS 2.2 04:43 - Entra ID blob SFTP access 05:18 - Standard HDD retirement 05:39 - Azure Databricks Lakeflow Connect Free tier 06:36 - Azure Databricks to Fabric federation 07:43 - Fabric mirroring and shortcut updates 08:58 - Fabric IQ updates 10:28 - Azure SQL DB versionless TDE 11:05 - SQL Server VS Code updates 11:45 - Foundry Agent Service 12:44 - Foundry Observability 13:59 - NVIDIA Nemotron models 14:15 - Foundry Local updates 14:44 - OpenAI GPT-5.4 mini and nano 15:23 - Entra Backup and Recovery 16:15 - Close
